reviews.comment:
Impresionante la tranquilidad con la que atienden en los surtidores. A veces hay colas larguísimas de autos y ni así ponen un poco de energía, además también son pocos los playeros para la cantidad de movimiento que suele haber en la estación. El encargado deberia controlar eso.

(Translated by Google)
The calmness with which they serve customers at the pumps is astounding. Sometimes there are incredibly long lines of cars, and even then they don't seem to put in any effort. There are also too few attendants for the amount of traffic that usually comes into play at the station. The manager should definitely address this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkeGNQSlF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la carga de combustible, 1 hora para poder salir de ahí... Pésimo servicio..
Al servicompras le doy 5 estrellas

(Translated by Google)
Fueling was very slow, it took an hour to get out of there... Terrible service.
I give Servicompras 5 stars.

reviews.comment:
Siempre explotado de gente. Recomiendo cargar en otro lado. Se pierde mucho tiempo allí.

(Translated by Google)
Always packed with people. I recommend loading somewhere else. You waste a lot of time there.

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención de los playeros a pesar de las interminables colas por ser la única estación de servicio de bandera en la zona. Ésto debería ser tenido en cuenta  por los directivos del ACA ya que el muy poco personal hace tremendos esfuerzos por atender correctamente.
Deberían incorporar personal, es sólo cuestión de pasar cualquier día a cualquier hora y ver...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beachgoers despite the endless queues because it is the only flag service station in the area. This should be taken into account by the ACA directors since the very few staff make tremendous efforts to provide correct care.
They should add staff, it's just a matter of stopping by any day at any time and seeing...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16014244491390867425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN0Z0o2X2NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Mucha espera para cargar nafta y los baños de terror. Nunca sentí tanto olor a orina en una YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Long waits to get gas and the bathrooms are awful. I've never smelled so much urine at a YPF station.
